project_type: Next.js 15 app with TypeScript, Prisma ORM, NextAuth v5, next-intl
test_framework: No test framework configured - manual verification only
verification_instructions: Run npm run build to verify TypeScript compilation and Next.js page generation. Check that no build errors occur.
snapshot_or_generated_files: prisma/schema.prisma generates @prisma/client via npm run db:generate
environment_constraints: Database is on Neon.tech - cannot run migrations from sandbox. New columns require SQL provided to user. UploadThing is used for file uploads with avatar endpoint already configured in core.ts.
contribution_requirements: Branch: fix/teacher-tests-listing. No specific contribution guide beyond standard Next.js patterns.
key_patterns: Client components use 'use client' directive. API routes in src/app/api/. i18n routing with Link from @/i18n/routing. Framer Motion for animations. lucide-react for icons. tailwind CSS classes. Auth via auth() from @/lib/auth. DB via db from @/lib/db. UploadThing already configured with avatar FileRouter endpoint.
directory_structure: src/app/[locale]/(main)/ contains dashboard, tests, results, profile, rating pages. src/app/api/ contains API routes. src/components/ui/ has shared UI components. src/lib/ has auth.ts and db.ts. src/messages/ has i18n JSON files.
